name: Sediment Geochemical Data from Cruise GeoB16320-2 in the Gulf of Mexico
description: This dataset contains sediment core measurements including Total Organic Carbon (TOC) and Total Inorganic Carbon (TIC) concentrations at specific depths, collected during the GeoB16320-2 cruise event. The data includes precise spatial coordinates (latitude, longitude, elevation) and a timestamp for the sampling event, representing a single static point in the Gulf of Mexico.
